pr_title: SDLC-34: Fix max_price filter in flight search
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the flight search `max_price` filter so it acts as an inclusive upper bound and returns flights priced at or below the requested limit.

## Changes
- Correct the filtering logic in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py::search_flights`
- Add/adjust service tests in `backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py`

## Validation
- Verify flights above `max_price` are excluded
- Verify flights at or below `max_price` are included
- Run the relevant backend service tests

## Context
This addresses SDLC-34, where `GET /flights/search?max_price=200` was returning flights above the limit instead of flights at or under it.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
